title: archanthemis calcarea
intro: Archanthemis calcarea, also known as Chamomile, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Archanthemis calcarea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it a popular natural remedy for soothing digestive issues, calming anxiety, and promoting relaxation. The health benefits of Archanthemis calcarea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Archanthemis calcarea is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and can also be found in capsule form, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
